additional_metadata.group_name: Ho Chi Minh City dbt Meetup
additional_metadata.venue_host: Dreamplex Ngo Quang Huy, District 2, HCMC

events.agenda: Inaugural HCMC dbt Meetup covering getting started as an analytics engineer with dbt, and orienting oneself in the modern data/BI landscape.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow, focusing on the impact of dbt in the data community.
events.location: Dreamplex Ngo Quang Huy, 42 Ngô Quang Huy, District 2, Ho Chi Minh City
events.raw_text:
Fri, Aug 19, 2022 · 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM ICT

Dreamplex Ngo Quang Huy, HCMC

HCM City dbt Meetup (in-person)

Presentation #1: Analytics Engineer & dbt - Getting started as an AE, analytics engineering concepts, and why data modeling is important. Speaker: Hoang Elliot, Lead Analytic Engineer, Joon Solutions.

Presentation #2: Making sense of the modern data landscape - History and shift of data/BI, why different tools are built the way they are. Speaker: Huy Nguyen, CTO and Co-founder at Holistics.

talks.description: An introduction to analytics engineering concepts for those getting started as an AE, covering data modeling fundamentals and early pitfalls to avoid.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #1: Analytics Engineer & dbt. Description: Getting started as an AE. Speaker bio: Hoang Elliot, Lead Analytic Engineer, Joon Solutions
talks.title: Analytics Engineer & dbt

talks.description: A history of the data/BI landscape and why different tools are built the way they are, to help data professionals orient themselves.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #2: Making sense of the modern data landscape. Speaker bio: Huy Nguyen, CTO and Co-founder at Holistics
talks.title: Making sense of the modern data landscape

Presentation by Y Huynh: The Rise of dbt, My Understanding of dbt, Using dbt for Data Transformation at Yeah1, Handle multiple source datasets on dbt and BigQuery.

additional_metadata.group_name: Ho Chi Minh City dbt Meetup

events.agenda: HCMC dbt Meetup #5 covering managing dbt test results pragmatically, and using dbt with BigQuery for free data literacy and analyst ownership.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.location: Holistics Vietnam office, 457 Nguyễn Đình Chiểu, District 3, Ho Chi Minh City
events.raw_text:
Sat, Apr 13, 2024 · 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM ICT

Holistics Vietnam office, HCMC

HCMC dbt Meetup #5

Talk #1: Collecting and managing dbt test results: a pragmatic approach to handling dbt warnings. Speaker: Minh Ngo (Enlin), Analytics Tech Lead at Infinite Lambda. Treats dbt bugfix as a separate process, covering issue recording, classification, prioritization, and community packages for automation.

Talk #2: Harnessing the simplicity of dbt and BigQuery to make your data talk for free. Speaker: Bruno Rassat, Data Lead at Entobel. Live demo of dbt for transformations, testing, and data literacy.

talks.description: A pragmatic approach to collecting and managing dbt test results and warnings, covering issue recording via run metadata, classification/prioritization, and automation via community packages.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 1️⃣ Collecting and managing dbt test results: a pragmatic approach to handling dbt warnings. Speaker: Minh Ngo (Enlin), Analytics Tech Lead at Infinite Lambda
talks.title: Collecting and managing dbt test results: a pragmatic approach to handling dbt warnings

talks.description: Using dbt and BigQuery to enable data analyst ownership of underlying data models, with a live demo of transformations, testing, and data literacy.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 2️⃣ Harnessing the simplicity of dbt and BigQuery to make your data talk for free. Speaker: Bruno Rassat, Data Lead at Entobel
talks.title: Harnessing the simplicity of dbt and BigQuery to make your data talk for free

HCMC dbt Meetup #6

dbt ON OPEN-SOURCE LAKEHOUSE ARCHITECTURE. Speakers: Phuc Tran & Hai Nguyen, senior data engineers at ShopBack Vietnam. Real-world examples of leveraging dbt to tackle data cleaning and transformation and build analytical models within an open-source lakehouse architecture.

Improving DevX in dbt with CI/CD & Co-pilot. Nhat Nguyen, Senior Analytics Engineer at Infinite Lambda.
